## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm test` and all tests pass.
- [ ] I verified the change in the app (`npm start`) and/or the CLI (`npm run cli`).
- [ ] I added/updated tests for my change.
- [ ] Secret detection still redacts sensitive files by default.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under **Unreleased** (if user-facing).
